creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Wed, Aug 26, 2009 at 12:30:03PM +0000, Andris Raugulis wrote:
> Uhm?! "submitter is not maintainer"? Rrright, then who is?
> I (submitter) am maintainer, check CVS of latest Makefile.
> 
> Can you fix this, and please explain why did it happen so that it won't
> happen again? Maybe I did something wrong sending this PR?

$ cd ../../devel/geany
$ make maintainer
ar@null.lv

$ grep From: /home/gnats/ports/138189
From: Andris Raugulis <ar@nul.lv>

mcl
